div.head: The Ambassador in Argentina (Armour) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1275. It is not intended to have another meeting of the American colleagues and in view of the hard feelings engendered among them because of precipitate action of Brazil resulting in independent action by other bordering countries, I consider it would be most undesirable to attempt to call them together in order to make the statement contained in Department’s 851, June 9, 4 p.m. I, therefore, propose to make the statement as instructed to the Foreign Minister tomorrow and to my American colleagues individually.
